types:type.name: serviceOrderCompleteInputPayload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type serviceOrderCompleteInputPayload = {| serviceOrderNo: String, sfLastSync: String, userDefinedFields: {| udUid: String, salesforceId: String, sendToSalesforce: String, multiVisitsNeeded: String, purchaseOrderNumber: String, completeInSalesforce: String |} |} {"example": "{\\\"serviceOrderNo\\\":\\\"12345\\\",\\\"sfLastSync\\\":\\\"2025-01-01 11:12:13.000\\\",\\\"userDefinedFields\\\":{\\\"udUid\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"salesforceId\\\":\\\"ASD345ASDD324V31PNXX\\\",\\\"sendToSalesforce\\\":\\\"N\\\",\\\"multiVisitsNeeded\\\":\\\"Y\\\",\\\"purchaseOrderNumber\\\":\\\"Salesforce PO Number\\\",\\\"completeInSalesforce\\\":\\\"Y\\\"}}"}
